item.title: Android Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Android Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: mobilephonedata
item.itunes:summary:
Android Recovery
(Utilities)
Site www.data-recovery-mobile-phone.com provides Android Recovery utility that does not need any special technical assistance from novice users in restoring back their deleted text files and folders from android based handsets. Data regain utility claims for minimal span of turn round time and efforts in regaining accidentally deleted videos from android phone.

[read more]

Android Recovery

Data regain utility claims for minimal span of turn round time and efforts in regaining accidentally deleted videos from android phone.

item.title: Card Restore [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Card Restore [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: memorycardrestore
item.itunes:summary:
Card Restore
(Utilities)
Card Restore application allows user to easily get back all crashed memorable snapshots, valuable images saved in formatted memory cards of your camcorder device. Innovative Card Restore software is useful in regaining deleted text files and folder saved in different format or extensions within minimal time period. Download Memory card data recovery program from www.memorycardrestore.com that offers you beast way to bring back whole damaged family images, audio, video from logically crashed compact flash cards. Card Restore application makes you capable in recovering overall misplaced data even if card read/ write error displayed on your computer or laptop. Easy to use memory card data restoration software is useful in retrieving entire video clips saved in any format or extensions. Card Restore program makes you capable in recovering your most precious anniversary images from accidentally removed memory card within minimal time period. Memory card data recovery program offers you best way to easily recovery overall formatted folders from damaged XD cards of any capacity. Card Restore program provides facility to get back all memorable images from improper handled multimedia memory cards and more. Card Restore application makes you capable in restoring whole friend’s images from logically corrupted compact flash cards just in few mouse clicks.Features:*Card recovery software supports all major USB memory cards for data loss recovery.* Easy to use and restore entire corrupted files and folder without wasting your valuable time and money.* Quickly retrieve erased or misplaced folders even if card read/ write error generated or displayed on your device.* restore accidentally damaged pictures saved in logically formatted secure data cards of any capacity within minimal time.

[read more]

[read more]

Card Restore application allows user to easily get back all crashed memorable snapshots, valuable images saved in formatted memory cards of your camcorder device. Innovative Card Restore software is useful in regaining deleted text files and folder saved in different format or extensions within minimal time period. Download Memory card data recovery program from www.memorycardrestore.com that offers you beast way to bring back whole damaged family images, audio, video from logically crashed compact flash cards. Card Restore application makes you capable in recovering overall misplaced data even if card read/ write error displayed on your computer or laptop. Easy to use memory card data restoration software is useful in retrieving entire video clips saved in any format or extensions. Card Restore program makes you capable in recovering your most precious anniversary images from accidentally removed memory card within minimal time period. Memory card data recovery program offers you best way to easily recovery overall formatted folders from damaged XD cards of any capacity. Card Restore program provides facility to get back all memorable images from improper handled multimedia memory cards and more. Card Restore application makes you capable in restoring whole friend’s images from logically corrupted compact flash cards just in few mouse clicks.Features:*Card recovery software supports all major USB memory cards for data loss recovery.* Easy to use and restore entire corrupted files and folder without wasting your valuable time and money.* Quickly retrieve erased or misplaced folders even if card read/ write error generated or displayed on your device.* restore accidentally damaged pictures saved in logically formatted secure data cards of any capacity within minimal time.

[read more]

item.title: digiKam [Graphic Apps]
item.itunes:title: digiKam [Graphic Apps]
item.itunes:author: digikamdeveloper
item.itunes:summary:
digiKam
(Graphic Apps)
digiKam is an advanced digital [b]photo management application[/b], which makes importing and organizing digital photos a "snap". The photos can be organized in albums which can be sorted chronologically, by directory layout or by custom collections.
Tired of the directory constraints? Don’t worry, digiKam also provides [b]tagging functionality[/b]. You tag your images which can be spread out across multiple folders and digiKam provides fast and intuitive ways to browse these tagged images. You can also add [b]comments and rating[/b] to your images. digiKam makes use of a fast and robust database to store these meta-informations which makes adding and editing of comments and tags very reliable.

An easy to use interface is provided that enables you to [b]connect to your camera[/b] and preview, download and/or delete your images. digiKam includes too an image editor for image corrections and manipulations.

Another tool, which most artists and photographers will be familiar with, is a [b]Light Table[/b]. This tool assists artists and photographers with reviewing their work ensuring only the highest quality. A light table will show the artist their imperfections in which they can go and touch up. Well in digiKam, the light table function provides the user a similar experience. You can import a photo, drag it onto the light table, and touch up only the areas that need it.

The digiKam [b]Image Editor[/b] come with some common tools e.g. red eye correction or colors correction. Additional tools are provided with the main application to process advanced corrections on image like color management, noise reduction, or special effects. digiKam Image Editor support all camera RAW file formats, 16 bits color depth, Exif/Makernote/IPTC/GPS metadata, Color management, tagging/rating/comments pictures, etc.

A lots of search tools are also available to be able to find specific photo on whole collection : [b]Time line[/b], Calendar, Advanced Search using multiple and complex database queries (tags, rating, keywords, date, location, camera, shot settings, etc.)

A stand-alone image editor version named [b]Showfoto[/b] is also available. It runs without digiKam images database support, but provides all Image Editor tools.

See the related project page for more information:

[url]http://www.digikam.org[/url]

Online documentations:

[url]http://docs.kde.org/development/en/extragear-graphics/digikam/index.html[/url]
[url]http://docs.kde.org/development/en/extragear-graphics/showfoto/index.html[/url]

NOTE:

- Please, use the digiKam mailing-list for all comments:

[b]digikam-users at kde dot org[/b]

- Please, use Bug Tracking System for wishes and reports:
[url]http://bugs.kde.org/buglist.cgi?product=digikam[/url]

You can contact developers on Freenode IRC channels:

[b]#digikam[/b]

or using the developers mailing-list :

[b]digikam-devel at kde dot org[/b]

To help digiKam project, you can [u]donate money to developers[/u]. Take a look at this page for details:

[url]http://www.digikam.org/donation[/url]
[read more]
item.description:
digiKam
(Graphic Apps)
digiKam is an advanced digital [b]photo management application[/b], which makes importing and organizing digital photos a "snap". The photos can be organized in albums which can be sorted chronologically, by directory layout or by custom collections.
Tired of the directory constraints? Don’t worry, digiKam also provides [b]tagging functionality[/b]. You tag your images which can be spread out across multiple folders and digiKam provides fast and intuitive ways to browse these tagged images. You can also add [b]comments and rating[/b] to your images. digiKam makes use of a fast and robust database to store these meta-informations which makes adding and editing of comments and tags very reliable.

An easy to use interface is provided that enables you to [b]connect to your camera[/b] and preview, download and/or delete your images. digiKam includes too an image editor for image corrections and manipulations.

Another tool, which most artists and photographers will be familiar with, is a [b]Light Table[/b]. This tool assists artists and photographers with reviewing their work ensuring only the highest quality. A light table will show the artist their imperfections in which they can go and touch up. Well in digiKam, the light table function provides the user a similar experience. You can import a photo, drag it onto the light table, and touch up only the areas that need it.

The digiKam [b]Image Editor[/b] come with some common tools e.g. red eye correction or colors correction. Additional tools are provided with the main application to process advanced corrections on image like color management, noise reduction, or special effects. digiKam Image Editor support all camera RAW file formats, 16 bits color depth, Exif/Makernote/IPTC/GPS metadata, Color management, tagging/rating/comments pictures, etc.

A lots of search tools are also available to be able to find specific photo on whole collection : [b]Time line[/b], Calendar, Advanced Search using multiple and complex database queries (tags, rating, keywords, date, location, camera, shot settings, etc.)

A stand-alone image editor version named [b]Showfoto[/b] is also available. It runs without digiKam images database support, but provides all Image Editor tools.

See the related project page for more information:

[url]http://www.digikam.org[/url]

Online documentations:

[url]http://docs.kde.org/development/en/extragear-graphics/digikam/index.html[/url]
[url]http://docs.kde.org/development/en/extragear-graphics/showfoto/index.html[/url]

NOTE:

- Please, use the digiKam mailing-list for all comments:

[b]digikam-users at kde dot org[/b]

- Please, use Bug Tracking System for wishes and reports:
[url]http://bugs.kde.org/buglist.cgi?product=digikam[/url]

You can contact developers on Freenode IRC channels:

[b]#digikam[/b]

or using the developers mailing-list :

[b]digikam-devel at kde dot org[/b]

To help digiKam project, you can [u]donate money to developers[/u]. Take a look at this page for details:

[url]http://www.digikam.org/donation[/url]
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
digiKam
(Graphic Apps)
digiKam is an advanced digital [b]photo management application[/b], which makes importing and organizing digital photos a "snap". The photos can be organized in albums which can be sorted chronologically, by directory layout or by custom collections.
Tired of the directory constraints? Don’t worry, digiKam also provides [b]tagging functionality[/b]. You tag your images which can be spread out across multiple folders and digiKam provides fast and intuitive ways to browse these tagged images. You can also add [b]comments and rating[/b] to your images. digiKam makes use of a fast and robust database to store these meta-informations which makes adding and editing of comments and tags very reliable.

An easy to use interface is provided that enables you to [b]connect to your camera[/b] and preview, download and/or delete your images. digiKam includes too an image editor for image corrections and manipulations.

Another tool, which most artists and photographers will be familiar with, is a [b]Light Table[/b]. This tool assists artists and photographers with reviewing their work ensuring only the highest quality. A light table will show the artist their imperfections in which they can go and touch up. Well in digiKam, the light table function provides the user a similar experience. You can import a photo, drag it onto the light table, and touch up only the areas that need it.

The digiKam [b]Image Editor[/b] come with some common tools e.g. red eye correction or colors correction. Additional tools are provided with the main application to process advanced corrections on image like color management, noise reduction, or special effects. digiKam Image Editor support all camera RAW file formats, 16 bits color depth, Exif/Makernote/IPTC/GPS metadata, Color management, tagging/rating/comments pictures, etc.

A lots of search tools are also available to be able to find specific photo on whole collection : [b]Time line[/b], Calendar, Advanced Search using multiple and complex database queries (tags, rating, keywords, date, location, camera, shot settings, etc.)

A stand-alone image editor version named [b]Showfoto[/b] is also available. It runs without digiKam images database support, but provides all Image Editor tools.

See the related project page for more information:

[url]http://www.digikam.org[/url]

[url]http://docs.kde.org/development/en/extragear-graphics/showfoto/index.html[/url]

To help digiKam project, you can [u]donate money to developers[/u]. Take a look at this page for details:

item.title: Mac Removable Media Restore [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Mac Removable Media Restore [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: memorycardrestore
item.itunes:summary:
Mac Removable Media Restore
(Utilities)
Macintosh Restoration program recovers accidently misplaced audio, video, text, pictures from MMC card. Mac Removable Media Restore application available on link www.memorycardrestore.com which is used for restoring inaccessible data files and folders from mac USB mass storage multimedia device within few minutes.

[read more]
item.description:

(Utilities)
Macintosh Restoration program recovers accidently misplaced audio, video, text, pictures from MMC card. Mac Removable Media Restore
(Utilities)
Macintosh Restoration program recovers accidently misplaced audio, video, text, pictures from MMC card. Mac Removable Media Restore application available on link www.memorycardrestore.com which is used for restoring inaccessible data files and folders from mac USB mass storage multimedia device within few minutes.

[read more]

item.title: Vista Partition Files Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Vista Partition Files Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: recoverdeletedfiles
item.itunes:summary:
Vista Partition Files Recovery Software
(Utilities)
How can you restore deleted or missing personal data and official document from damaged hard disk! Windows Vista partition recovery software salvages damaged or corrupted data, files, folders and directories due to inaccessible partition volume. Windows Vista data uneraser tool retrieves lost information such as txt, gif, ppt, doc, xls, mpeg, jpeg, jpg etc. Windows file repair software provides complete solution to restore formatted or corrupted FAT and NTFS windows partition. Windows data manager utility supports all major brands of storage media including Seagate, Hitachi, Toshiba, SanDisk, Samsung, Sony etc for providing complete solution of corrupted data recovery. Windows partition data salvage application retrieves data, files and folders which have been deleted by Shift + Del key. Windows Vista files undelete tool does not need any special technical knowledge or skill to operate the software. Windows Vista data repair software is designed to backup and restore important data, files, folders, directories and documents from undetected hard disk. Vista partition recovery specialist provides you in-built step by step data rescue help option. Windows Vista backup software provides salvage support to deleted long and short file name. Windows Vista files repair utility supports FAT as well as NTFS file system based hard disk. Features: * Windows backup files recovery software retrieves data, files and folders from previously existing partition. * Windows file systems rescue utility supports FAT32, FAT16, FAT12, NTFS and NTFS5 file system. * Windows Vista data uneraser tool retrieves erased data and files from inaccessible or corrupted hard drive. * Windows partition data salvage software backup lost video clips, wallpaper, photos, pictures, snaps, mp3, mp4 and song files.

[read more]
item.description:
Vista Partition Files Recovery Software
(Utilities)
How can you restore deleted or missing personal data and official document from damaged hard disk! Windows Vista partition recovery software salvages damaged or corrupted data, files, folders and directories due to inaccessible partition volume. Windows Vista files repair utility supports FAT as well as NTFS file system based hard disk. Features: * Windows backup files recovery software retrieves data, files and folders from previously existing partition. * Windows file systems rescue utility supports FAT32, FAT16, FAT12, NTFS and NTFS5 file system. * Windows Vista data uneraser tool retrieves erased data and files from inaccessible or corrupted hard drive. * Windows partition data salvage software backup lost video clips, wallpaper, photos, pictures, snaps, mp3, mp4 and song files.

[read more]

(Utilities)
How can you restore deleted or missing personal data and official document from damaged hard disk! Windows Vista partition recovery software salvages damaged or corrupted data, files, folders and directories due to inaccessible partition volume. Windows Vista data uneraser tool retrieves lost information such as txt, gif, ppt, doc, xls, mpeg, jpeg, jpg etc. Windows file repair software provides complete solution to restore formatted or corrupted FAT and NTFS windows partition. item.title: Mac Memory Card Restore [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Mac Memory Card Restore [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: memorycardrestore
item.itunes:summary:
Mac Memory Card Restore
(Utilities)
Download comprehensive files revival tool for Macintosh that enables users to rescue missing memorable picture collection from virus infected Mac OS based storage device. Simple to operate Macintosh DDR professional files rescue program enables users to undelete data that is erased due to virus attack on removable storage media. Professionally designed Mac Memory Card Restore software keeps safe retrieved video clipping at user defined location on computer system.

[read more]

item.title: Sim Card Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Sim Card Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: recoverdeletedfiles
item.itunes:summary:
Sim Card Recovery
(Utilities)
GSM SIM card backup utility use for restore all your important phone numbers or contacts and read or unread messages (SMS) from corrupted SIM card which was erased by any unknown factor like inserting in any infected cell, attacked by virus etc. This utility is capable to work with all GSM enabled networks of any country like Vodafone, Telenor, Mobilkom, Singtel, orange etc. Mobile phone management software works with any SIM reader or writer of any company like GF-CR05, Datopal Micro SD/T-F Dekart, ACR38DT, LG-SIMCR-001, GF-SCB-601, Tinpec Super Mini Micro SD/T-Flash, Mobile Express, all in one, ESR4618, ACT30, GT-CR-003, M-SIM, internal, ACR38T, All-In-1, GT-SCB-04, Contactless Smart card reader/writer, Tf, Backup Device LG-SBD-002 Dual Key, Imono USB 2.0 SD etc. Advanced recovery algorithm makes this utility very helpful in all forensic or investigation organizations to retrieve victims recent call history like details of missed calls, received calls and dialed numbers. Easy to use graphical user interface (GUI) makes this application very user friendly for both beginners and experts. Tool supports all windows operating system like Windows 11,Win 10,Win 8, 7 operating system. This application also recoup 20 digit IMSI number from the SIM but be sure while recovering your content that SIM is not locked by any PIN or PUK number. Important Features: * Works with any windows operating system including vista. * Capable to work with any network SIM card of any language. * Supports all GSM operators SIM of any country. * comes with an inbuilt help option. * Review all your recovered content on computer screen before restore them. * It is a unique, read only and nondestructive data recovery application. * Recover messages from inbox, sent items or drafts folders. * Supports user friendly GUI that makes this program easy to use.

[read more]
item.description:
Sim Card Recovery
(Utilities)
GSM SIM card backup utility use for restore all your important phone numbers or contacts and read or unread messages (SMS) from corrupted SIM card which was erased by any unknown factor like inserting in any infected cell, attacked by virus etc. This utility is capable to work with all GSM enabled networks of any country like Vodafone, Telenor, Mobilkom, Singtel, orange etc. Mobile phone management software works with any SIM reader or writer of any company like GF-CR05, Datopal Micro SD/T-F Dekart, ACR38DT, LG-SIMCR-001, GF-SCB-601, Tinpec Super Mini Micro SD/T-Flash, Mobile Express, all in one, ESR4618, ACT30, GT-CR-003, M-SIM, internal, ACR38T, All-In-1, GT-SCB-04, Contactless Smart card reader/writer, Tf, Backup Device LG-SBD-002 Dual Key, Imono USB 2.0 SD etc. Advanced recovery algorithm makes this utility very helpful in all forensic or investigation organizations to retrieve victims recent call history like details of missed calls, received calls and dialed numbers. Easy to use graphical user interface (GUI) makes this application very user friendly for both beginners and experts. Tool supports all windows operating system like Windows 11,Win 10,Win 8, 7 operating system. This application also recoup 20 digit IMSI number from the SIM but be sure while recovering your content that SIM is not locked by any PIN or PUK number. [read more]

Tool supports all windows operating system like Windows 11,Win 10,Win 8, 7 operating system. This application also recoup 20 digit IMSI number from the SIM but be sure while recovering your content that SIM is not locked by any PIN or PUK number. Important Features: * Works with any windows operating system including vista. * Capable to work with any network SIM card of any language. * Supports all GSM operators SIM of any country. * comes with an inbuilt help option. * Review all your recovered content on computer screen before restore them. * It is a unique, read only and nondestructive data recovery application. * Recover messages from inbox, sent items or drafts folders. * Supports user friendly GUI that makes this program easy to use.

item.title: Fat Data Restore [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Fat Data Restore [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: memorycardrestore
item.itunes:summary:
Fat Data Restore
(Utilities)
Searching utility that easily regain your lost files from hard drives partitioned on FAT file system? Now Eminent and cost effective Fat Data restore application is available at www.memorycardrestore.com website that help people to immediately regain your lost data, images and pictures from personal computer hard disk. Smart data recovery software is effective and reliable tool that easily regain deleted, corrupted or even formatted mass volume data from any personal computer hard disk drive partitioned with FAT 32 file system.

[read more]

Smart data recovery software is effective and reliable tool that easily regain deleted, corrupted or even formatted mass volume data from any personal computer hard disk drive partitioned with FAT 32 file system.

[read more]
